data.title: Add auto-detect resume branch in sprint SKILL.md Validate Primary Ticket
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
In the "Validate Primary Ticket" section of plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md, after step 1 (ticket show), add a new branch for epic-type tickets with in_progress status:

### Auto-Resume Detection (new section after step 1)
If the epic status is in_progress AND ticket type is epic:
(a) Print: "Epic <id> is in_progress — resuming from checkpoint scan."
(b) Run .claude/scripts/dso ticket deps <id> to check for children
(c) If zero children: log "No children found — falling through to Preplanning Gate" and continue to Drift Detection -> Preplanning Gate normally (scenario: abandoned mid-preplanning)
(d) If children exist: run drift detection with --status=open filter (.claude/scripts/dso sprint-drift-check.sh <epic-id> --status=open), then apply checkpoint resume rules (same logic as current "If --resume Flag" section lines 303-316), then proceed to Phase 3
(e) Non-epic tickets (story, task, bug) with in_progress status are NOT affected — they proceed through Non-Epic Routing as before

This task ADDS the new behavior. It does NOT remove --resume (that is a separate task). Both paths coexist temporarily.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md (Edit)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Auto-detect resume section exists in Validate Primary Ticket
  Verify: grep -q 'in_progress.*resum\|auto.*resum\|Resuming.*checkpoint' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] Zero-child guard documented
  Verify: grep -q 'zero child\|No children\|fall.*through.*Preplanning' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] Non-epic exclusion documented
  Verify: grep -q 'Non-epic\|story.*task.*bug.*not affected\|epic-type' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
